mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT campus_name FROM dorm_buildings ORDER BY FIELD(campus_name, '泰山区', '华山区', '启林区', '黑山区', '燕山区'), id ASC
SELECT id, campus_name, building_no, building_name, created_at, updated_at FROM dorm_buildings WHERE campus_name = #{campusName} ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(building_no, '栋', '') AS UNSIGNED), id ASC
